languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

languages.text: "Я питала слабую надежду, что тобой не будут вершиться надругательства над телами братьев, но нет, низменную человеческую природу не изменить".
"I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."
languages.original_text: "Я питала слабую надежду, что тобой не будут вершиться надругательства над телами братьев, но нет, низменную человеческую природу не изменить".

traits.locale_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."
"I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."
"I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

languages.text: «Conservaba la vaga esperanza de que no desecraras los cuerpos de mi gente, pero no. La vileza de la naturaleza humana es incorregible».
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: «Conservaba la vaga esperanza de que no desecraras los cuerpos de mi gente, pero no. La vileza de la naturaleza humana es incorregible».

languages.text: 「あなたが我が同胞の亡骸を冒涜せぬのではないかと、かすかな望みを抱いていた。だが違った――人間の本性の卑しさは、救いようがない」
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが我が同胞の亡骸を冒涜せぬのではないかと、かすかな望みを抱いていた。だが違った――人間の本性の卑しさは、救いようがない」

languages.text: “我曾抱有一丝微弱的希望，以为你不会亵渎我同胞的遗体。但显然，人类本性中的卑劣无可救药。”
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: “我曾抱有一丝微弱的希望，以为你不会亵渎我同胞的遗体。但显然，人类本性中的卑劣无可救药。”

languages.text: "Ich hatte die leise Hoffnung, Ihr würdet die Kadaver meiner Artgenossen nicht entweihen, aber nein, die menschliche Natur ist in ihrer Niedertracht unbelehrbar."
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte die leise Hoffnung, Ihr würdet die Kadaver meiner Artgenossen nicht entweihen, aber nein, die menschliche Natur ist in ihrer Niedertracht unbelehrbar."

languages.text: « J'entretenais le mince espoir que vous vous abstiendriez de profaner les corps des miens, mais j'avais tort. La bassesse de la nature humaine est insondable. »
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: « J'entretenais le mince espoir que vous vous abstiendriez de profaner les corps des miens, mais j'avais tort. La bassesse de la nature humaine est insondable. »

languages.text: "Benim türümün bedenlerine saygısızlık etmeyeceğine dair zayıf bir umut beslemiştim ama hayır, insan doğasının bayağılığı düzeltilemez."
languages.original_text: "I harboured a faint hope that you would not desecrate the bodies of my kind, but no, the baseness of human nature is incorrigible."

traits.locale_text: "Benim türümün bedenlerine saygısızlık etmeyeceğine dair zayıf bir umut beslemiştim ama hayır, insan doğasının bayağılığı düzeltilemez."
